description_long: This object is a metallic electric drill with a cylindrical body and a ribbed grip section, featuring a combination of silver, black, and bronze tones. The main body is constructed from metal, with a prominent ribbed section likely designed for improved grip and heat dissipation. At one end, there is a rounded, flared cap, while the opposite end features a more complex assembly with mechanical detailing, possibly for attaching drill bits. A rectangular, textured component is mounted on the side, which may serve as a control or indicator. The overall design is robust and industrial, with visible wear and metallic finishes suggesting durability and frequent use.
description: A robust, metallic electric drill with a ribbed grip, flared end cap, and detailed mechanical features in silver, black, and bronze. The design is industrial and durable, with a side-mounted rectangular component.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ribbed grip, flared end cap, and a rectangular component on top.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular, flared cap and the cylindrical body extending away.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the ribbed grip and rectangular component visible, showing more of the mechanical end assembly.
description_view_3: View from the drill bit end, showing the mechanical assembly and the ribbed grip extending away.
